name: Grilled Chicken, New Potato & Roasted Garlic Quesadilla Ftv
recipeIngredient: 8 Small new potatoes, cut in half
1 Cup Monterey Jack cheese, finely grated
1 Cup white Cheddar cheese, finely grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill.
2. Brush chicken with olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste. Grill for 5 minutes on each side or until cooked through. Remove from the grill and let rest.
3. Toss potatoes in olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste. Grill cut side down until golden brown, then turn over and continue grilling until cooked through.
4. Place 8 tortillas on a flat surface. Divide both cheeses among the tortillas.
5. Slice chicken on the bias into 1/4-inch thick slices. Cut each potato half in half.
6. Divide the chicken, potatoes, garlic, and thyme among the 8 tortillas.
7. Stack tortillas to make four. Top the four tortillas with the remaining four tortillas.
8. Brush the top of the stacked tortillas with olive oil and season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Grill, oil side down until golden brown. Carefully flip over and continue grilling until golden brown and the cheese has melted.
